titleStmt.title: SII 29.32: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 32. (A.R. No. 82 of 1961-62.) KOLANUPĀKA, BHUVANAGIRI TALUK, NALGONDA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Pillar (No. 3) dugout from the main street in the village.

States that when Chālukya Trailōkyamalladēva was ruling the empire from Kalyāṇa, perggaḍe Kāvaṇayya made a grant of kara-maryāde to Kāḷapa-seṭṭi of Manavakkulakēri in Koḷḷipāke on the orders of mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara Buddharasa. Also, it refers to the exemption of some taxes like bilkoḍe etc.
It is dated Śaka 986, Krōdhi, Bhādrapada, śu 13, Thursday. It corresponds to 1064 A.D., August 27, f.d.t. 46 Friday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samasta bhuva
nāśraya śrī pṛ
thvīvallabha mahā
rājādhirāja pa
ramēśvara parama
bhaṭṭāraka satyā
śraya kuḷatiḷa
ka cāḷukyābha
raṇa śrī matrai
ḷōkyamalladēva
ra vijayarājya
muttarōttarābhi
vṛddhi pravarddhamā
na mācandrārkka

tāraṁ salluttami
re kalyāṇada ne
levīḍinoḷu su
kha saṁkathā vinō
dadiṁ rājyaṁgeyvu
ttamire tatpāda
padmōpa jīvi sama
dhigata paṁcamahā
śabda mahāmaṇḍa
ḷēśvara sōmyama
hēśvara muḷivara
gaṇḍa kadanapacaṇḍa
rāyaArakṣanru
pāḷa jayāṁganā
lōḷa nayanābhi
rāma gaṇḍagaja
nirunābhaya ba
la subhaṭa vi
duganaydunāsi
ganari maṇḍaḷika
mada viharaṇa bā
(gala)dēviya ga
ndhavāraṇa śrīma
nmahāmaṇḍa

ḷēśvara buddharasara be
sadi sa(ma)starājya
para nirūpita mahā
māḷugradali virāja
māna mānōnnata prabhu
maṁtrōtsāha sa(śa)kti
traya sampannarappa
śrīmatpe(rggaḍe)
(kāva)ṇayya sakava
rṣa 9(8)6 neya krō
dhi saṁvatsarada bhādra
pada su(śu)ddha 13 bṛha
spati vāradaṁdu śrī
koḷḷipākeyā
manavakkulakēriya
kāḷapaseṭṭige koṭṭa
(kara) maryyādeya
nvinolagaḷiyā
dēhāradi dōṟu

pattanipūḷiA( )
va dharmateṟuvaṁ
Amarakereya po
ttake bilkoḍe yi
lla kāla(kālya kā)
dapa cinna muṁdi
ṟeya māḻu
pūtasūmilla
sarvvabādhā pari
hāramāge pra
ti pāḷisuvevu .
sāmānyōya(ṁ)
dharmmasētu nṛpā
ṇāṁ kāḷē kāḷē pā
ḷuniyō bhavadbhiḥ
sarvvānētā bāgina
pārttivēṁdrā bhū
yō bhūyō
yācate rāma
caṁdraḥ .
damaged
Digital edition of SII 29.32 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
